title: Allogene Therapeutics (ALLO) Q3 2024: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
text: Allogene Therapeutics (ALLO) Q3 2024 Earnings Preview. Earnings Release Date: November 7, 2024. Consensus Estimates: Revenue $0.01 million, EPS -$0.33. Full-year 2024 projections: $0.06 million revenue, -$1.40 EPS. Estimate Trends: Over past 90 days, 2024 revenue estimates improved from $0.05M to $0.06M. 2025 revenue expectations declined from $4.73M to $4.12M. Earnings estimates for 2024 improved from -$1.55 to -$1.40 per share. Recent Performance: Q1 2024 (ended March 31) reported $0.02M revenue, surpassing expectations by 120%. Earnings of -$0.35 per share aligned with projections, followed by 2.07% stock price increase. Analyst Outlook: Twelve analysts provide average price target of $9.51, suggesting potential 218% upside from current $2.99 price. Consensus recommendation from 17 firms rates stock as Outperform. GuruFocus flagged three warning signs.
